nodes.name: Code — load slots + build option list

parameters.responseBody:
✅

You're all booked!

Your meeting has been confirmed and added to the calendar.

Check your email for your receipt and Google Meet link.

parameters.subject: Your booking is confirmed!
parameters.message:
={{ $('Set — bookingId + meetLink').item.json.clientName }},

Your booking is confirmed. Your receipt PDF is attached and you can join Google Meet: {{ $('Set — bookingId + meetLink').item.json.meetLink }}.

If you want to cancel or reschedule, you may do so by opening the attached PDF.

See you soon!

parameters.responseBody:
🗑️

Booking Cancelled

Your booking has been cancelled.

✅

Booking is Not Cancelled

Make sure to be there. We look forward to seeing you!

nodes.name: Code — swap booked slots on reschedule

parameters.responseBody:
🔄

Booking Updated!

Your meeting has been moved to the new time and the calendar has been updated.

Check your email for your updated receipt.

parameters.subject: Your booking has been updated!
parameters.message:
={{ $('Set — reschedule bookingId + meetLink').item.json.clientName }},

Your booking has been rescheduled. Your updated receipt is attached.

Join Google Meet: {{ $('Set — reschedule bookingId + meetLink').item.json.meetLink }}

Need to cancel or reschedule again? Use the buttons inside the attached PDF.

See you soon!
